title: Module 1 knowledge check
markdown: Five questions on AI terminology and narrow vs. general AI. Unlimited attempts.

questions.prompt: Which statement best distinguishes machine learning from traditional programming?
choices: The system learns rules from examples/data instead of being given the rules explicitly.
It always uses a neural network.

questions.prompt: Which term is the broadest umbrella?
A spam filter that improves from labeled past emails is primarily an example of:
Most consumer AI products today are examples of artificial general intelligence (AGI).

choices: Successful AI techniques becoming ordinary software people stop calling "AI."
AI systems always improving forever without new data.
The requirement that all AI must be generative.
A law that bans narrow AI.

questions.prompt: Which is the best everyday example of generative AI?
choices: A writing assistant that drafts an email from a short instruction
A calculator adding two numbers with a fixed algorithm
A thermostat using a single temperature threshold
